name: azure-functions-admin-pp-mcp
description: Inspect, audit, and right-size your Azure Functions from the terminal — cold-start trends, config drift, and plan-fit answers the portal and az don't give you.

azure_client_id.title: AZURE_CLIENT_ID
azure_client_id.description: Sets AZURE_CLIENT_ID for the Azure Functions MCP server.

azure_client_secret.title: AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET
azure_client_secret.description: Sets AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET for the Azure Functions MCP server.

azure_subscription_id.title: AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID
azure_subscription_id.description: Sets AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID for the Azure Functions MCP server.

azure_tenant_id.title: AZURE_TENANT_ID
azure_tenant_id.description: Sets AZURE_TENANT_ID for the Azure Functions MCP server.
